creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
On Sat, 5 Aug 2006 21:50:51 UT
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of deskutils/pal,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/101440 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/101440
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

I approve the patch. Please commit it. 
Thanks.

- Herbert
